glosses.ja: 追いつく; 取り戻す

sentences.target: Je te rattrape au coin de la rue.
sentences.reading: /ʒə tə ʁatʁap o kwɛ̃ də la ʁy/

translations.fr: Je te rattrape au coin de la rue.
translations.ipa: /ʒə tə ʁatʁap o kwɛ̃ də la ʁy/
translations.en: I'll catch up with you at the corner.
translations.de: Ich hole dich an der Ecke ein.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ đuổi kịp bạn ở góc đường.
translations.nl: Ik haal je op de hoek in.
translations.hi: मैं तुम तक मोड़ पर पहुँच जाऊँगा.
translations.nb: Jeg tar deg igjen på hjørnet.
translations.id: Aku akan menyusulmu di pojok jalan.
translations.sv: Jag kommer ikapp dig vid hörnet.
translations.ro: Te ajung din urmă la colț.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the verb.
Clitic personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; direct object (COD) of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; meaning depends on object (here, catching up with someone).
Preposition 'à' contracted with the definite article 'le'; introduces a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the prepositional phrase 'au coin'.
Preposition linking 'coin' to the noun phrase 'la rue' (genitive-like relation).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'rue'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of 'de'.

translations.ja: 彼女はボールをキャッチする.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; here meaning 'to catch' (a ball).
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'ballon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object (COD) of the verb.

sentences.target: Tu rattrapes ton retard ce soir.

translations.fr: Tu rattrapes ton retard ce soir.
translations.es: Esta noche te pondrás al día.
translations.de: Du holst das heute Abend nach.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤에 밀린 걸 따라잡을 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今晚要把落下的进度补上。
translations.pt: Hoje à noite você vai colocar tudo em dia.
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn sẽ bắt kịp tiến độ.
translations.nl: Vanavond haal je de achterstand in.
translations.hi: तुम आज रात बकाया काम पूरा कर लोगे.
translations.el: Απόψε θα καλύψεις τα κενά σου.
translations.nb: I kveld tar du igjen det tapte.
translations.id: Malam ini kamu akan mengejar ketertinggalanmu.
translations.sv: I kväll tar du igen det du ligger efter med.
translations.ro: În seara asta îți pui la zi restanțele.
translations.da: I aften indhenter du det forsømte.
translations.ja: 今夜あなたは遅れを取り戻す.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; here 'to make up/catch up' something.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'retard'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object (COD) of the verb.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' to form a temporal expression.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the time NP 'ce soir' (temporal complement).

sentences.target: Nous rattrapons nos devoirs ce week-end.

translations.fr: Nous rattrapons nos devoirs ce week-end.
translations.en: We're catching up on our homework this weekend.
translations.es: Este fin de semana nos ponemos al día con los deberes.
translations.de: Wir holen dieses Wochenende unsere Hausaufgaben nach.
translations.it: Questo fine settimana ci mettiamo in pari con i compiti.
translations.ko: 이번 주말에 밀린 숙제를 따라잡을 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们这个周末要把作业补上。
translations.yue: 我哋呢個週末要追返啲功課。
translations.ru: Мы наверстаем домашние задания в эти выходные.
translations.pt: Neste fim de semana vamos colocar os deveres de casa em dia.
translations.he: בסוף השבוע הזה אנחנו משלימים שיעורי בית.
translations.vi: Cuối tuần này chúng tôi sẽ làm bù bài tập về nhà.
translations.ar: سننجز واجباتنا المنزلية المتأخرة في عطلة نهاية الأسبوع.
translations.nl: Dit weekend halen we ons huiswerk in.
translations.uk: Цими вихідними ми надолужимо домашні завдання.
translations.hu: Ezen a hétvégén behozzuk a házi feladatainkat.
translations.hi: हम इस सप्ताहांत अपना बकाया होमवर्क पूरा करेंगे.
translations.pl: W ten weekend nadrobimy nasze zadania domowe.
translations.el: Αυτό το Σαββατοκύριακο θα καλύψουμε τα κενά στις εργασίες για το σπίτι.
translations.nb: I helgen tar vi igjen leksene våre.
translations.id: Akhir pekan ini kami akan menuntaskan pekerjaan rumah yang tertunda.
translations.sv: I helgen tar vi igen våra läxor.
translations.ro: În weekend ne punem la zi cu temele.
translations.da: I weekenden indhenter vi vores lektier.
translations.ja: 今週末は宿題の遅れを取り戻す.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; here 'to make up/catch up on' work.
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural, plural form; modifies 'devoirs'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object (COD) of the verb.
Demonstrative determiner; modifies 'week-end' to form a temporal expression.
Loanword noun, masculine singular; head of the time NP 'ce week-end' (temporal complement).
